title: manilkara microphylla
intro: Manilkara microphylla, also known as the Malabar plum or ulidi, is a tropical fruit-bearing tree native to the Western Ghats of India. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The health benefits of Manilkara microphylla include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as its leaves and fruits, are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
